docs.title: Information System Contingency Plan
docs.roles_responsibilities: The ISCP Coordinator declares activation, the Recovery Lead (SRE on-call) executes restoration, the Communications Lead handles internal and customer notifications, and the AO/ISSO are informed; each role lists a primary and alternate with 24x7 contact details.
docs.recovery_objectives: Recovery Time Objective (RTO) is 4 hours and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) is 1 hour for the moderate-impact production system; degraded read-only service must be available within 1 hour.
docs.activation_criteria: The plan is activated when a component outage is expected to exceed the RTO, on loss of a primary availability zone, or on confirmed data corruption of a system of record; activation authority rests with the ISCP Coordinator or their alternate.
